text: You encounter a mysterious traveler at the crossroads.
Traveler: Greetings, wanderer. These roads can be dangerous alone.
Greet them warmly
You: Hello there! It's good to see a friendly face.
Traveler: Indeed it is. Perhaps we could travel together a while?
Eye them suspiciously
You: I can handle myself just fine.
Traveler: I'm sure you can. But even the strongest benefit from allies.
Ignore them and walk past
You walk past without a word.
Traveler: Suit yourself... but beware the bridge ahead.
You walk together down the winding path.
Traveler: I should warn you—there's trouble at the old bridge.
Ask for details
Traveler: Bandits have been collecting "tolls." Unfair ones.
Traveler: I know a secret path, if you're interested...
Traveler: But together, we might get through.
Say nothing
Traveler: I understand caution. The world has earned it.
They reach into their cloak. You tense.
But they only pull out a worn map.
Traveler: Here—take this. It shows a path around the bandits at the bridge.
Accept the map
You: Thank you. I... misjudged you.
Traveler: Safe travels.
Refuse
You: I don't need help.
You continue alone.
The bridge looms ahead, three figures waiting in the shadows.
Following the hidden path, you bypass the bridge entirely.
The forest is quiet here. Peaceful.
You emerge safely on the other side, grateful for the unexpected help.
The bridge bandits block your path.
But you're not alone.
Traveler: Let us pass, or face us both.
The bandits reconsider and step aside.
Bandit: Toll's ten gold. Or we take your pack.
Pay the toll
You hand over the coins reluctantly.
Fight!
It's a tough fight, but you prevail.
You cross the bridge and continue your journey.
